description: Contact Enrichment Pipeline — Automated background job that periodically enriches contact/lead data from external providers (Clearbit, Apollo). Includes: BullMQ queue intelliflow-contact-enrichment, enrichment adapter with rate limiting, on-create trigger in contact.router.ts, periodic cron sweep for stale profiles (>30 days), cost tracking via CostTracker, field updates (company, title, social profiles, industry)
notes: Requires external API keys (CLEARBIT_API_KEY or APOLLO_API_KEY). Use mock provider in development. Depends on ai-worker queue infrastructure (IFC-168) and contact domain model (IFC-131).
